description:
Set up Stripe in test mode and codify the launch data boundary.

**Scope**
- Add Stripe SDK configuration, typed helpers, test webhook setup, and environment configuration.
- Create `docs/stripe-data-policy.md` defining allowed metadata: opaque Apoth IDs, Cognito subject aliases, MDI pointer aliases, and environment tags only.
- Add grep/regex or unit-test checks that reject condition names, medication names, diagnoses, symptoms, questionnaire answers, clinician notes, or other PHI in Stripe metadata/product descriptors we control.

**Acceptance**
- Stripe helpers work in test mode with fake keys.
- No-PHI policy is linked from RULES or compliance docs.
- Automated checks fail on representative PHI-shaped metadata examples.
title: Stripe SDK setup + no-PHI data policy
